zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Calthorpe於大約1332年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，他的父親WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I36歲，母親Isabel Lovell23歲。他與Isabel Bacon在英國英格蘭諾福爾可索普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年68歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可考可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Calthorpe于大约1332年出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，他的父亲WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I36岁，母亲Isabel Lovell23岁。他与Isabel Bacon在英国英格兰諾福爾可索普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年68岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可考可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Calthorpe was born about 1332, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I, was 36 and his mother, Isabel Lovell, was 23. He married Isabel Bacon in Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1399, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Calthorpe est né environ 1332, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Lovell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bacon à Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1399, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver Calthorpe um 1332 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I 36 und seine Mutter Isabel Lovell 23. Er hat in Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Isabel Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1399 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England und wurde in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Calthorpe è nato il circa 1332 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Lovell, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Bacon nel Thorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1399, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Calthorpeが約1332年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE Iは36歳，母Isabel Lovellは23歳であった。イギリスイギリスノーフォルクソルペでIsabel Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで68歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクコクソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Lovell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 소에서 Isabel Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 콕소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Lovell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Bacon em Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1399, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Calthorpe родился около 1332 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Lovell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bacon в местности таурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1399 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver Calthorpe nació aproximadamente 1332, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabel Lovell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabel Bacon en Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1399, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
